creator: barabbas@gmail.com
text:
=> mutt/mutt-1.5.12.tar.gz is not in /usr/ports/chinese/mutt/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/chinese/mutt/distinfo is out of date, or
=> mutt/mutt-1.5.12.tar.gz is spelled incorrectly.

How-To-Repeat: under /usr/ports/chinese/mutt/ and then execute `make all install clean`
or just portinstall zh-mutt-devel
